title: Chickens Lay Anything
description: Configure what items chickens lay using loot tables!
body:
![Logo spelling the project's title, styled similarly to the official Minecraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/27672ec5dfeafa5682d9c9ee20262f693899c512.png) #### About this data pack This data pack allows for the customization of the items laid by chickens using **loot tables**. It also provides the possibility of automatically running functions *as* and *at* a chicken whenever it lays an egg. #### Check out the "Chickens Drop Feathers" add-on pack I've made [here!](https://modrinth.com/datapack/chickens-drop-feathers) --- Demonstration video, using `minecraft:chests/pillager_outpost` as the loot table: --- #### How does it work? How do I create add-on content for this? Check out the [wiki](https://codeberg.org/helmo2019/minecraft-chickens-lay-anything/wiki/Home) to learn more!
*README, Modrinth version*
